modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be several noticeable typos and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Users unable to sign in to Metasys Web UI.

full_description_text: Some users can log into Metasys Launcher. But they can't access the Web UI. This is causing confusion and issues. Need to understand why this is happening.
short_description: Users unable to sign in to Metasys Web UI.
description: Some users can log into Metasys Launcher. But they can't access the Web UI. This is causing confusion and issues. Need to understand why this is happening.
